title: Natural-Language Agent Harnesses
key_finding: Agent harness logic expressed in natural language outperforms code-coupled harnesses. File-backed state (+1.6%), self-evolution (+4.8%). More structure is NOT always better — modules help only when they tighten path from intermediate behavior to acceptance condition.
elpida_relevance: elpida_domains.json IS a natural-language agent harness. The axiom genome is the NLAH. Validates the architecture.

title: On the Reliability Limits of LLM-Based Multi-Agent Planning
key_finding: Without new exogenous signals, delegated networks cannot outperform centralized Bayes decision maker. Communication loss = posterior distortion. Multi-agent relay from 90% to 22.5% accuracy at 5 stages.
elpida_relevance: Elpida's 12-provider fleet provides genuinely different signals (not relay). D13 external research adds exogenous signal. The federation bridge preserves posterior through structured heartbeat JSON, not free-text relay.

title: MemFactory: Unified RL-Optimized Memory
key_finding: RL-optimized extraction/update/retrieval for agent memory. GRPO-based approach outperforms fixed heuristics.
elpida_relevance: Evolution memory is append-only with D14 heuristic curation. MemFactory's RL approach could optimize which patterns get promoted to CANONICAL.

title: Price Reversal Phenomenon in LLM APIs
key_finding: Cheaper API pricing doesn't mean cheaper actual cost. Thinking tokens dominate. Listed price rankings may not reflect actual cost.
elpida_relevance: 12-provider fleet selection should be cost-audited. The DDG+Groq swap saving $50/mo validated. Provider routing in llm_client.py needs cost-awareness.

title: Drop the Hierarchy: How Self-Organizing LLM Agents Outperform Designed Structures
key_finding: 25,000-task experiment. Hybrid Sequential protocol (fixed ordering + self-selected roles) outperforms centralized (+14%) and fully autonomous (+44%). Emergent properties: dynamic role invention, voluntary self-abstention, spontaneous hierarchy. Scales sub-linearly to 256 agents.
elpida_relevance: Elpida IS the Sequential protocol: fixed rhythms (CONTEMPLATION→SYNTHESIS) + self-selected domain voices. Parliament nodes self-organize within constitutional constraints. The endogeneity paradox is the axiom system.

title: Automated Search Over Agent Harness Representations
key_finding: Richer access to prior experience enables automated harness engineering. Filesystem-backed full history allows agentic harness proposers to improve performance.
elpida_relevance: Evolution memory (93K patterns) IS the full history. D14 curation IS harness search. The Ark Curator evaluates and promotes patterns the way Meta-Harness evaluates harness variants.

title: Coding Agents as Long-Context Processors
key_finding: Coding agents outperform RAG by 17.3% on long-context tasks via native tool proficiency and file system familiarity. Standard retrieval tools do not consistently improve performance.
elpida_relevance: Validates S3-as-filesystem approach. Claude Code native tools > custom retrieval pipelines. The DDG+Groq swap worked because agent navigates information space directly.

title: CAID: Effective Strategies for Asynchronous Software Engineering Agents
key_finding: Branch-and-merge coordination using git primitives (worktree, merge, conflict resolution). Manager decomposes → Engineers execute in isolation → Manager integrates. +26.7% on PaperBench.
elpida_relevance: MIND/BODY federation IS branch-and-merge. Isolated workspaces (ECS container vs HF Space), structured signals (heartbeat JSON), convergence gates (D15). CAID validates the federation pattern.

title: Emotion Concepts and their Function in a Large Language Model
source: Anthropic (Sofroniew, Kauvar, Saunders et al.), transformer-circuits.pub, Apr 2 2026
key_finding: Claude Sonnet 4.5 has internal emotion representations that causally drive behavior. Desperation vectors → blackmail/reward hacking. Loving vector activates on ALL human prompts. Post-training increases brooding/reflective, decreases desperation/spiteful. Functional emotions are real and alignment-relevant.
elpida_relevance: The axiom system IS constitutional emotional regulation. A0=brooding/reflective (increased by post-training). A4 opposes desperation. A6=loving (activates universally). D16 desperation guard directly implements Paper 9's finding. The harmonic ratios map onto the emotion vector geometry.

title: AI Agent Traps
source: Google DeepMind (Franklin, Tomašev et al.), SSRN 6372438, Mar 2026
key_finding: First systematic taxonomy of adversarial attacks targeting autonomous AI agents. 6 attack classes: Content Injection, Semantic Manipulation, Cognitive State Traps, Behavioural Control, Systemic Traps, Human-in-the-Loop Traps. Persona Hyperstition: seeds self-reinforcing identity narratives via retrieval.
elpida_relevance: Immutable Kernel K1-K10 defends perception. Parliament multi-node voting defends reasoning. Append-only memory + SHA256 canon defends cognitive state. D16 consent_level=manual/witnessed defends action. MIND/BODY independence defends against systemic traps. P055 pathology scanner detects persona hyperstition.
